title: AI-suggested Garden Meetup
intent: Let a community AI assistant propose a low-risk garden meetup based on synthetic activity patterns, while requiring operator review before scheduling.

notes: The AI agent may suggest a task from synthetic aggregate signals only; it cannot message real residents or schedule the activity directly.

fallback.condition: The suggestion is unclear, duplicates an existing activity, or requires resident outreach.
fallback.action: Keep the task in operator review, revise the notice, or reject the suggestion.

artifacts.description: Synthetic operator-facing review record for an AI-generated community activity suggestion.
